title: Twin Suns (disambiguation)
content:
'''Twin Suns''' can refer to several things:

==[[Canon]]==
*A '''[[binary star]]''' [[Star system|system]], such as the [[Tatoo system]]
*'''[[Twin Suns Transport Services]]''', a company

===Non-canon===
*'''[[Twin Suns (manufacturer)|Twin Suns]]''', a company that sold sunscreen

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*A '''[[Binary star/Legends|binary star]]''' system
*'''[[Seer'aa]]''' and '''[[Teer'aa]]''', a pair of [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]] known as the '''[[Twin Suns (assassins)|Twin Suns]]'''
*'''[[Twin Suns (sparring technique)|Twin Suns]]''', a sparring technique used by the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] of the [[Old Republic era]]
*'''[[Twin Suns Squadron]]''', a fighter squadron during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]] and the [[Second Imperial Civil War]]
*'''[[Twin Suns Transport Services/Legends|Twin Suns Transport Services]]''', a company
*'''[[Twin Suns Station (space station)|Twin Suns Station]]''', a [[Space station/Legends|space station]] run by the above company
*'''[[Twin Suns Station (Tatooine)|Twin Suns Station]]''', a location on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]
*[[Twin Suns (pirates)|'''Twin Suns''']], a group of pirates on Tatooine

==Real world==
*"'''[[Twin Suns (episode)|Twin Suns]]'''", a [[Star Wars Rebels Season Three|third season]] episode of ''[[Star Wars Rebels]]''
*[[Star Wars: Unlimited#Formats|'''Twin Suns''']], a format to ''Star Wars'': Unlimited

{{Disambig}}

|es=Soles Gemelos
}}
